slides.headline: Audit-Readiness Checklist
slides.body: Verify these five things before a compliance survey.

slides.headline: Review your COE
slides.body: Ensure all students' Certificates of Eligibility are up to date and verified.
bullets: Check for any discrepancies or outdated information.
Verify COE status on the VA website.

slides.headline: Understand your SAA letter
slides.body: Make sure you are following the latest instructions from your State Approving Agency.
bullets: Refer to your most recent SAA letter for compliance details.
Review any updates or changes in the letter.

slides.headline: Verify your Yellow Ribbon Program
slides.body: Confirm that all Yellow Ribbon eligibility and applications are current.
bullets: Check all students' Yellow Ribbon application status.

slides.headline: Review your Chapter 33 files
slides.body: Ensure all Chapter 33 documents are accurate and up-to-date.
bullets: Verify all necessary documents are in place.

slides.headline: Understand your 85/15 rule
slides.body: Comply with the 85/15 rule by ensuring all required documentation is available.
bullets: Check if any students are still under the 85/15 limit.

slides.body: Learn more about VASCO Assistant Pro. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Get ready for your next compliance audit with this quick checklist. Ensure your COE, SAA letter, Yellow Ribbon Program, Chapter 33 files, and 85/15 rule are up to date.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, which could benefit from a more concise headline to better match the concise nature of the other slides.
